faqs.question: How quickly can you provide fly control service in Westbury?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day fly control services throughout Westbury and surrounding Long Island areas. Our technicians can typically arrive within 24 hours of your call to address urgent fly infestations in homes or businesses.

faqs.question: What does the $350–$550 fly control service include?
faqs.answer: Our fly control service includes a thorough inspection to identify breeding sites, targeted treatment using professional-grade products, sanitation recommendations, entry point sealing, and a follow-up visit if needed. Pricing varies based on property size and infestation severity.

faqs.question: What types of flies do you treat in Westbury properties?
faqs.answer: We eliminate all common fly species in Westbury including house flies, fruit flies, drain flies, blow flies, and cluster flies. Our technicians identify the specific species infesting your property to apply the most effective treatment method for complete elimination.

faqs.question: Are your fly control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and application methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We provide clear instructions for any necessary precautions and can offer eco-friendly treatment options upon request for sensitive environments.
